title: DeidentifiedStoreDestination
description: Contains configuration for streaming de-identified FHIR export.

config.description: The configuration to use when de-identifying resources that are added to this store.

store.description: The full resource name of a Cloud Healthcare FHIR store, for example, `projects/{project_id}/locations/{location_id}/datasets/{dataset_id}/fhirStores/{fhir_store_id}`.
